title: Glow Lichen Fix
description: Stop getting annoyed at those fake diamonds!
body:
![comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df99c786e086a022525b94aff74684fa1dc13835.png)

<center>

### This pack turns glow lichen blocks into an alternative vine.

Every single version of Minecraft with glow lichen is supported (1.17-current). If there isn't a download for your version, try the closest one, as it will probably work!

[![Ultraservers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/975b29c3c9453d777f239cad60e4ca56382f2d54_0.webp)](https://ultraservers.com/stovonson)

made by splewsh

</center>
